subject: A large asymmetric Eldrazi drone creature filling the frame, its carapace dark and segmented, with multiple glowing yellow eyes distributed across its form and appendages — shown emerging from or pressing through a curved rocky tunnel
description: A close-up of a massive Eldrazi creature pressing through a curved rocky passage. The creature has a heavily segmented dark exoskeleton — deep black and dark olive tones — and multiple glowing amber-yellow eyes distributed asymmetrically across its body and on the ends of branching appendages. Its form is beetle-like in silhouette but clearly non-natural, with no bilateral symmetry and limbs that terminate in claw-like structures. The rocky tunnel walls curve around it in warm ochre and brown tones, creating a sense of constriction. No weapon is visible — the creature's threat comes from its mass and limbs alone.
foreground: Dark segmented Eldrazi carapace, multiple glowing yellow eyes, claw-tipped limbs
background: Curved rocky tunnel walls in warm ochre and brown
